default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Superhuman and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, SEO performance, and product updates.](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX to provide comprehensive analytics on blog performance and SEO metrics](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [New content ideas: email signature templates page and AI agents in productivity](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=54.0)
  - [Superhuman's enterprise focus: AI adoption, email collaboration, and shifting from Slack](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=860.0)
  - [GrowthX to align content strategy with Superhuman's evolving product vision and market positioning](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=1400.0)

## Topics

### SEO and Content Performance Update

  - [125+ AI-focused articles published](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [Stat-based articles showing promising early traffic (e.g., 32 clicks on day one)](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=233.0)
  - [Indexing issues being addressed; blog sitemap to be submitted to Search Console](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=300.0)
  - [New Looker dashboard being implemented for refreshed data visualization](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)

### Email Signature Templates Content Idea

  - [Proposal to create a comprehensive pillar page on email signatures](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=408.0)
  - [Will include 20+ HTML templates with implementation instructions](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Potential for high traffic and backlinks due to Superhuman's domain authority](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Agreed to proceed despite Superhuman not having native signature feature](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Superhuman Product Updates

  - [Launching vacation autoresponders in 2-3 weeks with "Summer of AI" campaign](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=623.0)
  - [Heavy focus on AI agents in H2 2023 (Gmail, Outlook, voice dictation)](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=720.0)
  - [Shifting towards a productivity and collaboration suite of solutions](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Moving upmarket with enterprise-focused AI adoption strategies](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=824.0)

### Enterprise AI Strategy

  - [Enterprises building AI budgets ($300-$500 per employee per month)](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=891.0)
  - [Superhuman positioning email as foundational AI-native workflow](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=932.0)
  - [Value prop: modernizing email for better team collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=943.0)
  - [Addressing pain points with Slack in large organizations (1,500+ employees)](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)

### Productivity and Collaboration Trends

  - [Shift from Slack back to email for better organization and thoughtful communication](https://fathom.video/share/yvP3fqZ7MqPygG5Z2Zh7yKdS7SKsB9Yp?tab=summary&timestamp=1317.0)
